member.title: Member
member.description: This credential attests that you are a member of the issuer organisation

datasupplier.title: Open Future Data Supplier
datasupplier.description: This credential attests that you are a verified Open Future data supplier.

liccium_datasupplier.title: Liccium Data Supplier
liccium_datasupplier.description: This credential attests that you are a verified Liccium data supplier.

connect.title: Connect
connect.description: This credential attests that you are owner of Liccium app account with corresponding did:key

student.title: Student
student.description: This credential attests that you are a student of the issuer organisation

external_keypair.title: Open Future Data Supplier
external_keypair.description: This credential attests that you are a verified Open Future data supplier.

liccium_external_keypair.title: Liccium Data Supplier
liccium_external_keypair.description: This credential attests that you are a verified Liccium data supplier.

external_keypair_verification.title: Keypair Verification
external_keypair_verification.description: Platform-issued proof that the creator completed an external keypair challenge and controls the associated DID key.
external_keypair_verification.requirements: Issued automatically during Data Supplier credential request
